productDisplayName: Maxima Men White Dial Chronograph Watch
description: Case style: Stainless steel round case with black detailDial style: White dial with silver and white coloured hands  Strap style: Steel strap with butterfly clasp Features: Three dials on the face, branding on the 12 hour mark, screw to reset time and date aperture at the 4 hour mark , buttons for stopwatch Waterproof to 3 ATM, wearable around sinks and in mild rains Warranty:  1 year
